misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni, a stalwart of Hirsala Golf, has been a defining presence at the Hector Trophée since its inception. Known for his meticulous attention to detail and organizational skills, Toni is not only a fierce competitor but also the primary organizer behind the Hector Trophée, dedicating countless hours to ensure the event's success each year.

With an impressive record of 12 appearances, Toni's commitment to the tournament is unmatched. His skill and dedication have translated into remarkable success, with Toni securing the coveted Hector Trophée on three occasions and the Victor Trophy twice. These wins underscore his exceptional talent and unwavering focus on the course.

Those who have played with Toni describe him as a player of unwavering focus and determination. As he prepares for his 13th appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, Toni remains a formidable force, driven by a passion for the game. His continued presence and pursuit of excellence ensure that he will continue to be a compelling figure in the tournament for years to come.
